title: Post Workout Filipino Egg Lumpia
description: A garlicky and flaky Filipino dish featuring egg, perfect for post-workout meals, this vegan-friendly lumpia is a great way to refuel and satisfy your hunger.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Prepare the egg replacer according to the package instructions.
Mix the minced garlic, melted vegan chocolate, salt, and black pepper into the egg replacer.
Lay a lumpia wrapper on a flat surface and place about 1 tablespoon of the egg mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with a small amount of water.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Carefully place the lumpia in the preheated oil and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the lumpia from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the lumpia hot with chopped scallions on top, if desired.
